name: Create Agent
description: Creates an agent in the caller's namespace. Without overwrite, an existing slot is a no-op (idempotent). With overwrite=true, an existing SLEEPING or SUSPENDED agent has its config updated in place (timeline preserved); a TERMINATED agent is wiped and re-created fresh; a RUNNING agent is rejected. See venue/docs/AGENT_LOOP.md §4.1 for the full slot resolution table.

config.description: Agent configuration. Either an inline map or a string reference that resolves to one — workspace path (e.g. 'w/templates/reader'), asset ref (/a/<hash>), DID URL, or venue operation name. Key fields: systemPrompt (what the agent does), tools (array of operation names it can call), model (LLM model, default gpt-4o), caps (capability restrictions). A resolved template may also include a 'state' field which is used as the agent's initial state.

operation.description: Transition operation for the agent (e.g. 'llmagent:chat'). Determines how the agent processes tasks.

systemPrompt.description: System prompt defining the agent's role and behaviour

tools.description: Tool operations the agent can call (e.g. ['covia:read', 'covia:write']). Default tools are included automatically.

caps.description: Capability restrictions — array of {with, can} objects limiting what the agent can access

oneOf.description: Reference to a config map stored in workspace, assets, or elsewhere

definition.description: Asset ID of an agent definition using the legacy nested format (meta.agent.config). For the unified approach, pass the reference directly in 'config'.

overwrite.description: If true and the slot is occupied: SLEEPING/SUSPENDED → update config in place (timeline preserved); TERMINATED → wipe and re-create; RUNNING → fail. If false (default), an occupied slot is a no-op.

status.description: Current status of the agent: SLEEPING, RUNNING, SUSPENDED, or TERMINATED

created.description: True if a new record was written (empty slot or TERMINATED revival)

updated.description: True if an existing SLEEPING/SUSPENDED record was updated in place; mutually exclusive with created
